purpose: Define CRM/client/project traceability with shared OneDrive folder references, external documents, pipeline stages and related email/communication traces without connecting real OneDrive or writing files.
principle: TyA as consultora/franchise relationship and final clients/projects must be represented without confusion. Shared OneDrive folders can be linked as external references and later integrated if authorized.
documentTraceRules: A client/project may store OneDrive folder URL as an external reference without downloading files.
Documents may be referenced by metadata and link before any Storage integration exists.
Cost sheets and proposals can be linked/downloaded later only under authorized policy.
Every document must link to owner entity: client, project, opportunity, partner or tenant.
Do not copy sensitive raw files into repo.
Do not connect OneDrive API from this contract.
crmTraceRules: Prospects must keep historical trace even if paused or reactivated later.
Final clients may be direct-billing local clients or delegated international project clients.
TyA shared folders can be linked under businessPartner/consultora or under specific client/project as applicable.
Email traces, WhatsApp traces and document references should appear in the client/project history when linked.
Pipeline history must preserve stage changes, owner, date and notes.

newLessons: Difference between TyA/consultora relationship and final clients/projects
How to link a OneDrive folder to a client or project
How to link proposals and cost sheets
How email and WhatsApp traces appear in client history

hardStops: Do not connect OneDrive API from this contract.
Do not download or store real shared files from this contract.
Do not write Firestore from this contract.
Do not upload sensitive client documents to repo.
Do not confuse business partner/consultora with final client records.
